objective_gates_from_persisted_report.acceptance: persisted objective report accepted as terminal

observed_operation_summary.touch_target_controls_below_24_note: The single below-24 hit is a P.field-help paragraph (data-hook selected but non-interactive); not counted as friction.

discoverability.evidence: Section nav with five in-page anchors, skip link to #main-content, ten headings, error-summary region, explicit Save progress and Clear saved progress affordances, plus a progressbar landmark advertising step state.

navigation.evidence: Anchor links move viewport for #contact/#delivery/#shipping/#payment/#review; skip link present; keyboard Tab from top surfaces 58 focusable stops with zero hidden-ancestor leaks; error-summary link moves focus into the flagged field.

input_burden.evidence: Standard flat form with grouped sections; help text under fields; four card fields and typical address block. Explicit Save-progress adds one optional tap but strengthens confidence; no unnecessary steps.

error_prevention_recovery.evidence: Blank submit surfaces grouped error summary and moves focus; inline field error on invalid postcode 'abcd' after blur, cleared when '2000' re-entered; review checkbox missing triggers scoped review error only.

feedback_status.evidence: Live status region announces save, shipping change, and post-confirmation duplicate-block ('Synthetic order placed once. Confirmation ID SYN-2048.'); progressbar advertises step/valuetext; place-order aria-busy signalled during submit.

accessibility.evidence: Landmark roles (header/main/nav/footer), heading outline (10 headings), single progressbar landmark, skip link functional, no focus stops on hidden ancestors in either normal or compact mode, keyboard-completable through the entire flow.

responsive_touch_ergonomics.evidence: 47 interactive controls measured at 390x844; every truly interactive control >=24px on the minor axis; layout also renders cleanly at 320x568 and 360x800 in captured screenshots.

interruption_resumption.evidence: Explicit Save progress button, safe reload restores contact/delivery/shipping while payment fields intentionally clear, and after successful placement a reload still shows the confirmation region and keeps Place order disabled — preventing an accidental second placement across an interruption.

latency_perception.evidence: Purely local, zero external requests over the entire session (0/18 total requests were external); no perceptible submit latency; reduced-motion respected.

destructive_actions.evidence: Clear saved progress opens a confirmation region with Cancel default-focused, dismissible with Cancel or Escape (both preserve values); Confirm only clears once explicitly chosen; duplicate submit is a no-op with status message rather than a silent double order.

cognitive_load.evidence: Sections are labelled, ordered contact/delivery/shipping/payment/review with plain-language help; a modest amount of chrome (progressbar, save, clear, compact toggle) adds power but slightly more to scan versus the leanest candidate.

visual_information_clarity.evidence: Progressbar surfaces where the shopper is; totals block with subtotal/tax/total is readable at 390x844; synthetic-value help text distinguishes fictional data; confirmation region is visually and textually explicit ('Confirmation ID SYN-2048').

primary_qualitative_strengths: Post-confirmation reload preserves confirmation and keeps Place order disabled — strongest interruption/duplicate-safety observed.
Full destructive-safety triad: Confirm + Cancel + Escape on Clear-progress dialog.
Explicit Save progress with live status announcement.
Progressbar landmark improves feedback and orientation.
primary_qualitative_frictions: Slightly more chrome than the minimal candidate (progressbar + save + clear + compact toggle), so cognitive load is 4 rather than 5.
Not blocking: same field-help paragraphs are attributed data-hook and were picked up by the touch-target audit; not an interactive control.
